backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that text in About, Contact, Footer, Navigation, and Services components was changed from white to dark (text-gray-900/text-ink) to restore default dark text appearance.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend source file describing color/contrast changes made to CSS variables, Tailwind config, and all section components to ensure dark text on light backgrounds.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with a root div and module script tag loading main.tsx, titled 'Handyman Company Website'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer components without any overlay or modal.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying company story, trust badges, a founder blockquote, and a highlights grid, with all body text using dark text-ink classes on a light background.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a free-quote email CTA, phone link, and contact info cards (phone, email, location, hours), using dark text-ink for all descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Empty file — the CustomizationPrompt component has been removed with no content remaining.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with brand info, quick links, services list, business hours, and a bottom bar, with all text using dark text-ink classes on a light background.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, white overlay, headline, tagline, CTA buttons, stats, and a scroll indicator; tagline and stat labels use text-white against the overlaid background.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a mobile hamburger menu, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button that gains a shadow on scroll.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying eight handyman service cards (plumbing, electrical, carpentry, etc.) in a responsive grid with a Philadelphia-to-NJ service area banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Oswald and Inter fonts, defining CSS custom properties for the design system (orange, snow, ink palettes), and utility classes for section titles and dividers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom color palettes (orange, ink, snow), fonts (Oswald/Inter), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, and a pending feature request (AR-1) to keep Hero section text white while restoring dark text in all other sections.
